chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-204 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on M.A. No.3099/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.05.2022 Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto, Advocate for applicant. == It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that the proposed accused have demanded “Bhatta” from the applicant, therefore, he by making such application sought for direction against the police to record his F.I.R for the said incident, it has been dismissed by learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace vide order dated 26.01.2022, such order being illegal is liable to be set-aside by this Court with direction to police to record F.I.R of the applicant for the above said incident. The report furnished by the police is not supporting the allegation of the applicant. Learned counsel for the applicant on asking was fair enough to admit that no “Bhatta” was paid by the applicant to the proposed accused. If it was so then the best course available for the applicant would be to exhaust his remedy u/s: 200 Cr.P.C. No illegality is apparent which may justify this Court to make interference with the impugned order; consequently, the instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed in limine together with the listed application. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*,
